534 NTRTN_NONE_ADMSN_CD NTRTN_NONE_ADMSN_CD Nutritional Approaches (Admission) : None CHAR 1 This column documents whether none of the above nutritional approaches were applicable at the time of admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
535 NTRTN_NONE_7_DAY_CD NTRTN_NONE_7_DAY_CD Nutritional Approaches (7 days): None CHAR 1 This column documents whether none of the above nutritional approaches were applicable in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- =
